modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: CCSF user unable to log into 25Live system.

full_description_text:  
User from Community College Sioux Falls is experiencing login issues.  
Attempts to access the 25Live system are unsuccessful.  
The user reports repeated failures during the login process.  
This issue is impacting their ability to utilize the platform effectively.
